privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world GPX data (fells_loop) representing the Middlesex Fells Reservation, mapped using ExpertGPS by Topografix. The dataset genuinely contains 86 waypoints, confirming the task description's claims. The search plan coordinates provided in the task are synthetically generated and placed in the Medford, MA area. No explicit metadata claims were provided in the task definition to verify.
